subject: HETE trigger H4044: RTT150 optical observations
body:
R. Burenin, M. Pavlinsky, R. Sunyaev (IKI), 
I. Khamitov, Z. Aslan (TUG), U. Kiziloglu (METU), E. Gogus (Sabanci Uni.), 
I. Bikmaev, N. Sakhibullin (KSU/AST)

report:

The error box of the unusual X-ray transient H4044 (Arimoto et al., GCN 4942
--- the second outburst from the source H4043, Fenimore et al., 4938) was
observed with Russian-Turkish 1.5-m telescope (RTT150, Bakirlitepe, TUBITAK
National Observatory, Turkey) on April 3, 00:45 UT. We made 3x300R mosaic
images of the field, covering the entire HETE error box. Comparison of the
obtained images with DSS-II plate reveal no new objects down to the limit of
DSS-II.

This message may be cited.
